node.title: Anyone appeared for Uber SDE-2 drive (31st Aug)?

topic.title: Anyone appeared for Uber SDE-2 drive (31st Aug)?

post.content:
Hi,

Has anyone appeared for Uber SDE-2 drive on 31st Aug ? I got an Uber code signal test for the same but didn't hear back from the HR later. Just wanted to know what was the cutoff for the test if anyone appeared for the same.

Thanks.
Can you share how you got invite for the drive? Did you apply on any portal or recruiter reached out in LinkedIn? It would help. Thanks in advance.
Can you please share the questions asked
How many questions and how much did you score?
Cutoff - for hiring drive was if 2 question was there then 2/2 , if 4 question were there then 3/4.\nMore than 60 + candidate was giving on-site
same, didnt get hear back from the HR, her name is V****
